summary: Iteration 98 - Testing compact sync button, PhotosPanel component, and backend photos endpoint. All backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI tests PASSED for sync button compactness, menu visibility, and 5-tab navigation. PhotosPanel UI could not be directly tested (test agent has 0 farmers), but code review confirms correct implementation.
critical_code_review_comments: PhotosPanel component (line 383-480) correctly implements: farmer name display, GPS status, camera capture button, 'Retour au profil' button
Sync button is correctly placed inside profile card as a compact bar (line 81-91)
Backend POST /api/agent/photos endpoint correctly validates empty photos and saves metadata to agent_photos collection

success_rate.backend: 100% (4/4 tests passed: auth required, empty photos validation, single photo save, multiple photos save)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI tests passed: compact sync, 3 menu items visible, 5 tabs navigation)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Test agent has 0 assigned farmers, so PhotosPanel UI cannot be tested by clicking on a farmer profile. The PhotosPanel component code is correctly implemented at line 383-480 in AgentTerrainDashboard.jsx. Backend photos endpoint works correctly. To fully test PhotosPanel UI, either: 1) Assign farmers to the test agent, or 2) Use a cooperative account that has farmers.
